text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Arrrrgh! That hurts like something else! Being
injured is the worst!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going to get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If I take a break, I'll just fall behind again—I'll be
left in the dust.
choice_data_list: I can't let you train right now.
Can you promise me you won't overdo it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. If I say I'm going, that's what I'm gonna
do!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? I'm not gonna sit here for a lecture.
choice_data_list:
If your injury gets worse, you'll only fall further
behind.

If your injury gets worse, you'll only fall further
behind.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. I just need to rest, right? Fine!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? No idea why you're thanking me. I just
wanna win is all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan looks frustrated, but she takes
some time to rest up.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's not like I want to push myself too hard. I know what happens if I—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ouch! Crap! Ooh, this is bad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurry to help her. It seems her injury has gotten
worse.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's not like I want to push myself too hard. I know what happens if I do.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Like, I think it's working!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
How's this? If we just do some weight training,
you shouldn't have any complaints. Am I a genius
or what?
choice_data_list: One weight training plan, coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aha, so you get it. Make it a good one, promise?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan maintains a reasonable
training schedule and makes a full recovery!
